message:
fix(runtime,server,store): fix appenddirname default, remove dead constants, and update xinfo_consumers test

CONFIG GET appenddirname returned empty/incorrect value when AOF was disabled.
Now returns "appendonlydir" as the default dirname matching Redis, and extracts
just the directory basename when a path is configured.

Removes dead constants COMMAND_TIME_BUDGET_MS and MAX_CLIENTS. Updates
xinfo_consumers test to destructure the new (name, pending, idle) tuple format.
Applies rustfmt formatting across CONFIG GET/SET and RDB serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
